TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chishang, title = Chishang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chishang} }

S.FORM: Chishang (Ikekami go, śĪ†šłäťĄČ) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.23 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.44 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.05 km¬≤), 7,640 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,901 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,162 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 28%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Chishang ays psgayun 8 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan

Chishang (Ikekami go, śĪ†šłäťĄČ) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.23 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.44 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.05 km¬≤), 7,640 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,901 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,162 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 28%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Chishang ays psgayun 8 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč (ikekami …£o, ***) mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. s~…ēinpŇčan s~…ēeńßu s~…ē Ēuli s~…ēku s~…ēańßuj …£o. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, kalokapuk , mulijaw , ¶~ ®ikowa Ēaj , *ińßekoaj , ¶~ ®iataw , ¶~ ®ipuwa , *aŇča*aŇčas~…ēan , kawaliwali , ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj . kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an
